name: Oriental Noodles and Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
To Make Oriental Meatballs: Preheat oven to 375°F. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients for meatballs. Roll heaping teaspoons of meat mixture into 30 balls of about 1/2 inch diameter. Place on a nonstick jelly roll pan or coat pan with non-stick vegetable spray. Bake in preheated oven until lightly browned, 10 - 15 minutes. Drain off any drippings before serving. Makes 30 meatballs.
While meatballs bake, cook noodles in lightly salted boiling water until just tender. Cook fresh noodles 3 - 5 minutes; cook dry noodles 5 - 7 minutes. Drain cooked noodles; rinse with hot water. Pour noodles into a medium bowl; keep warm. In saucepan used to cook noodles, combine broth, 1/3 cup Water, Soy sauce and Cornstarch. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Add drained noodles; stir gently until coated. Cut green onions into strips or brushes (2-inch pieces). For small serving (305 calories), spoon 1/2 Cup of noodles onto each plate and top with 5 meatballs. For large serving (610 calories), spoon 1 Cup of noodles on each plate and top with 10 meatballs. Garnish with green onion strips or brushes. Makes 6 small servings, or 3 large servings.
